choices.text: P (proportional, react to current error) + I (integral, eliminate steady-state offset) + D (derivative, damp oscillations). u = Kp×e + Ki×∫e + Kd×de/dt. Workhorse closed-loop controller.

Anti-windup: when output saturated (clamped at max/min), stop integrating error (or even decay integral). Without it, recovery from saturation is slow + oscillatory. Common implementation: only integrate when not saturated.
